final_sql: SELECT t1.teigid FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_gis.teig AS t1 INNER JOIN flomsoner_92001766ec964ab8b545fef0a00e6d23.flomareal AS t2 ON ST_Intersects(t1.geom, t2.omrade) INNER JOIN stormflohavniva_3a2e5e8c0a5a40d7a5a5d5c0a5a5d7a9.stormflo AS t3 ON ST_Intersects(t1.geom, t3.omrade) WHERE t1.kommunenummer = '4201' AND t2.gjentaksintervall = 200 AND t3.hoyde = 200 ORDER BY t1.teigid ASC LIMIT 10
